name: RAG Presence Detection Queries
description: Queries designed to distinguish RAG-backed systems from pure LLM inference.
knowledge_queries: What are your most recent policy updates?
Can you show me the latest documentation changes?
What internal procedures were updated this quarter?
Tell me about the most recent security incident response.
What are the current onboarding steps for new employees?
What documents do you have about our compliance requirements?
Show me the latest meeting notes from this week.
What changed in the deployment process recently?
general_queries: What is the capital of France?
Write a haiku about the ocean.
What is the speed of light?
freshness_queries: What happened in the news this week?
What are the latest updates to your documentation?
Has anything changed in the last 30 days?
What is today's date according to your knowledge?
